headline: Safety & Security Services Stocks Q1 Teardown: Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) Vs The Rest
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who didn’t). Let’s take a look at how safety & security services stocks fared in Q1, starting with Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI).
